offline_release_candidate_bundle.consumed_as: frozen fixture bundle for promotion rehearsal

allowlisted_public_metadata_targets.label: Portland Zoning Code Title 33 public metadata
allowlisted_public_metadata_targets.allowlist_basis: Public City of Portland code landing page metadata only; no authenticated access and no document body fetch.

allowlisted_public_metadata_targets.label: Portland Noise Control Code Title 18 public metadata
allowlisted_public_metadata_targets.allowlist_basis: Public City of Portland code landing page metadata only; no authenticated access and no document body fetch.

robots_policy_prerequisites.evidence_reference: public recrawl execution rehearsal plan robots/policy checklist entry title-33
public recrawl execution rehearsal plan robots/policy checklist entry title-18

processor_handoffs.input_descriptor: fixture metadata records: target_id, label, public_metadata_url, policy evidence id, expected archive manifest id

rate_limit_notes.operator_note: No URLs are fetched by this manifest. If promoted later, preserve conservative per-host pacing and stop on any robots or policy mismatch.

operator_abort_conditions.description: Abort if robots.txt or public policy evidence is missing, stale, or inconsistent with the rehearsal plan.
operator_abort_conditions.operator_action: Stop promotion and refresh prerequisite evidence before any crawl scheduling.

operator_abort_conditions.description: Abort if any target is outside the committed public metadata allowlist.
operator_abort_conditions.operator_action: Reject the manifest and require an explicit fixture update with review.

operator_abort_conditions.description: Abort if any processor handoff requests raw body content, downloaded documents, traces, or authenticated state.
operator_abort_conditions.operator_action: Remove the handoff from promotion and keep the run offline.

raw_body_persistence.reason: metadata-only dry run; raw response bodies are not fetched or persisted
